notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Brenton Doyle pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brenton Doyle singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Addison Barger. Braxton Fulford to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braxton Fulford pops out to first baseman Kazuma Okamoto in foul territory.

notableEvents.detail: Brenton Doyle doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Addison Barger, deflected by center fielder Nathan Lukes.
